programmes.show_name: Can You Keep It Up For A Week?
programmes.show_description: Comedy. Annette will marry Gil, her hapless boyfriend, on condition he keeps his new job for a week without getting up to mischief with other women. Contains sexual scenes.
Scottish-born actor Alan Cumming explores the picturesque Outer Hebrides of Scotland, touring the Western Isles from Barra to Stornoway on Lewis, Eriskay and the Callanish stones.
4/5. The team mark the centenary of the 5th Earl of Carnarvon's discovery of Tutankhamen's tomb, and prepare for the biggest event of the summer - the Battle Proms
14/20. An antiques expert, a market trader and an upcycler compete to make the most money. Philip Serrell, Tony Wong and Micaela Sharp head to Stratford-upon-Avon.

3/5. Alan Titchmarsh and the team transform a large garden neglected due to a family tragedy. Three years on, it can once again be a pleasant open space for entertaining.
8/15. Rick visits a Suffolk bakery making artisan sourdough. He meets an old friend who sells fresh fish on the beach, and back at home, he has a go at making sushi.

In this episode, Tonia Buxton pays a visit to Greece's capital Athens. She cooks avgolemono soup, which is a filling chicken and rice dish, and souvlaki - Greece's favourite fast food.(S1/E8)

Gordon Laid is a soldier returning to London after WW2. He gets mixed up in a series of murders and mistaken identities. Bawdy romp with Robin Askwith. Contains nudity.

programmes.show_name: Mary Millington: Come Play With Me
programmes.show_description: Two hapless forgers hide out in a Scottish manor house. When a troupe of dancing girls join them musical numbers, comedy and sauce ensues. Contains sexual scenes.
Documentary telling the story of how Dartmoor was saved from development so its natural beauty could be preserved and shared with the public.
5/5. The castle transforms into a magical winter wonderland, as the team wrestle their biggest-ever tree and butler Louis gets very merry hosting a cocktail making master class. Last in series.

Action. World War II. Allied commandos are parachuted into North Africa on a mission to infiltrate and hold an Axis-held fort until reinforcements arrive. Lee Van Cleef stars.
Holland. Spring 1945. Two armies face each other in the final confrontation of World War II. The Allied forces and the remains of the Third Reich. Frederick Stafford stars.
Thriller. A gold mine foreman becomes embroiled in a conspiracy to inflate the price of gold by flooding the mine. Can he stop the dodgy conspirators? Roger Moore stars.

11/35. Charlie and Chris face one of their biggest challenges ever in Witney as they try to transform a steep and shaded garden into a woodland-inspired vision.
A playboy astrologer has to prove his alibi for a years-old robbery. With Mary Millington and Diana Dors. Contains sexual scenes and 70s social attitudes.
